top_story.title: Masters 2026 Final Round: Rory McIlroy Defends Title Against Cameron Young
top_story.summary: The 2026 Masters Tournament concludes today (April 12) at Augusta National Golf Club with defending champion Rory McIlroy tied for the lead with Cameron Young at 11 under par. The final round features a dramatic showdown as McIlroy attempts to become a back-to-back Masters champion while Young seeks his first major victory. Seven golfers remain within five shots of the lead, setting up a potentially historic Sunday at Augusta.
top_story.why_it_matters: The Masters is golf's most prestigious major tournament and a cultural touchstone in sports. McIlroy going for back-to-back titles adds significant drama, while a Young victory would crown a first-time major champion. The tournament draws massive global viewership and represents the unofficial start of the golf season for casual fans.

additional_stories.title: Monte Carlo Masters Final: Alcaraz vs Sinner for World #1
additional_stories.summary: Defending champion Carlos Alcaraz faces Jannik Sinner in the Monte Carlo Masters final on April 12. The winner will claim the world number one ranking in a winner-takes-all showdown between two of tennis's biggest rivals.

additional_stories.title: NBA Play-In Tournament Set to Begin April 14
additional_stories.summary: The SoFi NBA Play-In Tournament tips off April 14-17, with the full playoffs beginning April 18. Multiple seeds remain undetermined entering the final day of the regular season.

additional_stories.title: NHL 'Supreme Saturday' with 15 Games Determines Playoff Picture
additional_stories.summary: April 12 features a full slate of 15 NHL games with multiple playoff spots still on the line. Seven spots remained unclaimed entering the final day of the regular season.
